messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Reddit says Socrates wrote Politics and that historians just don't give him enough credit — is there any truth to that?

That Reddit claim doesn't hold up at all. Socrates wrote nothing — he left zero texts, which is one of the most agreed-upon facts in the history of philosophy. Politics was written by Aristotle. Socrates predated Aristotle by a generation, and everything Socrates taught was transmitted orally or through Plato's writings. The idea that historians are hiding Socrates' authorship of Politics simply has no basis.
